title: luscious juicy kid-friendly australian chicken tagine
description: australian-inspired chicken stew cooked in a clay tagine. perfect for a weeknight dinner with the kids.

ingredients.name: chicken stock cube
ingredients.notes: make sure it's gluten-free or use homemade stock

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a mild oil like canola or grapeseed if you prefer

ingredients.name: curry powder
ingredients.notes: use a mild or kid-friendly curry blend

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: minced or crushed for easier cooking

instructions: heat olive oil in the clay tagine over medium heat.
add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the red bell pepper and cook for another 5 minutes.
add the tomato and cook for 2 minutes more.
add the chicken, stock cube, curry powder, and paprika. stir well to combine.
add 1 cup of water and bring to a simmer.
reduce heat to low and let cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
season with salt and pepper to taste.
garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
